creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
I have added "kern.vt.enable_bell=1" to /etc/sysctl.conf instead and it started to work while speaker_load="YES" is set on /boot/loader.conf.

Also disabled syscons bell in /etc/sysctl.conf.

I didn't notice much difference in vt's bell after the patch but you may have noticed it.

I think this report can be closed.
